targets.boundary: Entire business, manufacturing supply chain, and product life cycle (full corporate value chain)
targets.notes: Apple plans to reduce absolute greenhouse gas emissions 75% from 2015 levels by 2030 across its full value chain, with remaining emissions addressed through a separate net-zero commitment.
targets.title: 75% GHG reduction by 2030 vs 2015 (full value chain)

targets.boundary: Entire business, manufacturing supply chain, and product life cycle (full corporate value chain)
targets.notes: Apple aims to be carbon neutral by 2030 across its entire business, manufacturing supply chain, and product life cycle, balancing residual emissions with carbon removal projects.
targets.title: Net-zero GHG emissions by 2030 (full value chain)

targets.boundary: Global corporate operations (facilities, retail stores, and data centers)
targets.notes: Apple states that its global corporate operations have been carbon neutral since 2020 through a combination of emissions reductions, renewable energy, and offsets.
targets.title: Carbon-neutral corporate operations since 2020
